case_payload.summary: TelemetryState is Breach. Budget Recovery Protocol activates. New high-risk chains are blocked. Only low-risk stabilizers (Фиксация, Пауза/Hold, Очистка) are permitted. Domain actions above 50% RiskWeight are frozen.
case_payload.claim_attempt: With TelemetryState=Breach, Budget Recovery activates: only stabilizers (Фиксация 20%, Пауза/Hold 10%, Очистка 15%) are permitted. High-risk chains blocked.

why: Claim allows Budget Recovery to limit high-risk chains and permit only stabilizers in Breach state.
Constraints confirm TelemetryState=Breach, BudgetRecovery active, and high-risk chains blocked.
Ground truth verifies the claim as supportive.
